name: John's of Bleecker Street
teaser: Much more thin and balanced than I remember. I can almost guarantee you will house an entire pie yourself.
review: Much more thin and balanced than I remember. The ingredients are nothing special, and I doubt the prep has been improved much in decades, but I can almost guarantee you will house an entire pie yourself.
headsUp: Cash only. No slices. Get a whole pie.
update: Ownership is stable. The coal oven is producing the best pies in years.
address: Bleecker & Jones, West Village, New York
